case_title: PATEL, N.R. vs. RICHARDSON, EMMETT et al

docket_entries.description: CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

DEPT 1/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT WITH PLTF. DEFTS EMMETT RICHARDSON AND KENDRA THOMAS PRESENT IN PRO- PER. CASE SETTLED; TERMS NOT ON RECORD. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMNT/STIP SIGNED BY PARTIES. PARTIES INDICATED UNDERSTANDING AND ACCEPTANCE OF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, EMMETT THOMAS, KENDRA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 106 SIXTH STREET #406, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-22-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE TIMELY, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT OF $820, DAMAGES OF $18.57 PER DAY FROM 6-15-9 6 THRU 7-22-96 PLUS COSTS OF $83. SEC DEPOSIT IS FORF TO PLTF. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & FEES IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY & PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, EMMETT THOMAS, KENDRA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, EMMETT THOMAS, KENDRA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RICHARDSON, EMMETT THOMAS, KENDRA
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-19-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
